Appearances:
Plaintiff Elias Abu-Yaghi is present.
Attorney Kenneth Scott Katzoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michael Healey is present.
Attorney Michael McCloskey representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-30-2012 remains on calendar.
